news.headline: Strategist warns of declines in the 'bro bubble'.
Best Buy (NYSE:BBY) forecasts $2.41/share earnings (down from $2.72), $13.7B revenue (down from $14.65) for Q4. Shares closed at $88.62, down 2%.
news.summary: Consumer electronics retailer Best Buy Co., Inc. (NYSE: BBY) is set to announce its Q4 financial results on March 4, 2025, before the market opens. Analysts predict earnings of $2.41 per share, a decrease from $2.72 in the same period last year. The company expects quarterly revenue of $13.7 billion, down from $14.65 billion year-over-year. Following a disappointing fiscal Q3 report on Nov. 26, 2024, Best Buy's stock slid 2% to close at $88.62 on Thursday. For more details, including analyst ratings, visit Benzinga's website.

news.headline: PAR Technology (NYSE:PAR) to release Q4 results on Feb. 28. Analysts forecast a loss of 8 cents per share & $99.1 million in revenue. Shares fell 2.3% to $60.71 before earning call.
news.summary: PAR Technology Corporation, listed on NYSE as PAR, is set to unveil its Q4 financial results on Feb. 28. Analysts predict a quarterly loss of 8 cents per share, an improvement from the 33 cents loss per share reported last year. The company, headquartered in New Hartford, New York, anticipates a quarterly revenue of $99.1 million, down from $107.71 million in the previous year. On Jan. 22, PAR Technology revealed the pricing of a private offering amounting to $100 million aggregate principal of 1.00% convertible senior notes due 2030. Notably, PAR Technology’s shares dipped by 2.3% to close at $60.71 on Thursday. Detailed coverage is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Nvidia stock falls 13.13% in 2025, erasing $375B in investor wealth despite strong earnings, sparking mixed analyst reactions.
news.summary: Shares of Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) dropped by 13.13% in 2025, resulting in a loss of around $375 billion in investor wealth despite strong fourth quarter earnings. The company's stock fell by 8.48% to $120.15 per share following the fourth-quarter earnings report, where Nvidia surpassed estimates on all fronts and achieved record sales of $11 billion in the first quarter alone for its Blackwell AI chips. Some analysts attribute the decline to concerns about the company's gross profit margins, increased competition, customer concentration, and high expectations. However, other analysts argue that these concerns are unfounded and that Nvidia's earnings performance was excellent. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Dutch Bros and customers raise over $1M for local organizations on Dutch Luv Day, donating $1 from every drink sold.
news.summary: In Grants Pass, Oregon, on February 28, 2025, Dutch Bros Coffee collaborated with its customers to collect over $1 million during its yearly Dutch Luv Day of Giving event. During the event on February 14, $1 from each beverage purchased was contributed towards aiding in creating promising futures within the local communities connected to Dutch Bros.

news.headline: Private equity deals facing EBITDA challenges.
Tuya Smart partners with DeepSeek to enhance AIoT platform with large language model for smart home robots.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, Tuya Smart, a worldwide AI cloud platform service provider, announced the integration of the DeepSeek large language model into its AIoT platform. This move aims to assist developers globally in designing advanced smart home management robots. Tuya Smart, listed on NYSE as TUYA and HKEX as 2391, envisions leveraging this integration to revolutionize the smart home industry.

news.headline: Bloomberg critiques Covid strategies in Blue states.
BofA analyst predicts 50% surge in Rolls-Royce stock.
Enterprise Products Partners L.P. (NYSE: EPD) releases 2024 tax packages, available online. Mailing starts Feb 28, 2025. Call for more details.
news.summary: In Houston, Enterprise Products Partners L.P. (NYSE: EPD) has made its 2024 tax packages, containing schedule K-1s, available online. The tax packages for 2024 can be found on the K-1 Tax Package Support website, www.Taxpackagesupport.com/enterprise. Starting on February 28, 2025, the partnership plans to send out the 2024 tax packages and expects to finish mailing them by March 7, 2025. Unitholders seeking further details can contact K-1 Tax Package Support for assistance.

news.headline: Amerit Fleet Solutions acquires Vector Fleet Management to enhance services; strengthens fleet management capabilities.
news.summary: Amerit Fleet Solutions, a prominent provider of customized fleet maintenance and management services for commercial fleets, has recently acquired Vector Fleet Management. This acquisition bolsters Amerit's standing in the industry by expanding its service offerings to include fleet maintenance and parts management services geared towards state and local government and heavy industrial fleets. Amerit's dedication to providing exceptional services is highlighted through this strategic move.

news.headline: Polestar secures USD 450M term facility and renews EUR 480M green trade finance facility, totaling over USD 1.25B.
news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, Polestar (Nasdaq: PSNY) announced that it has obtained a 12-month term facility worth up to USD 450 million and has extended the EUR 480 million Green Trade Finance Facility (TFF). This follows the company's successful acquisition of over USD 800 million in 12-month term facilities in December 2024 and another USD 450 million term facility in February 2025. Initially, in February 2022, Polestar had entered into a 12-month TFF with a group of renowned global banks.

news.headline: USDD Earn offers 20% APY for HTX amid declining crypto market with BTC at $80,000 and ETH dropping. Market sentiment in "Extreme Fear."
news.summary: In Singapore on February 28, 2025, the volatile cryptocurrency market sees Bitcoin (BTC) dropping to approximately $80,000, with Ethereum (ETH) also experiencing a downward trend. CoinGlass reports a prevailing "Extreme Fear" sentiment among investors due to the market conditions.

news.headline: Bladex reports record net income of $206M, up by 24% and increases dividend by 25%, showing confidence in growth trajectory.
news.summary: Banco has achieved a record-breaking net income of $206 million, marking a significant 24% increase compared to the previous year. In a display of confidence in the bank's growth, there has been a notable 25% increase in dividends. The growth in fee income has also been strong, primarily fueled by increased activity in syndications and letters of credit. These financial achievements were announced by the bank in Panama City on February 28, 2025.

news.headline: Fairfax plans to redeem 5,440,132 Series E, 2,099,046 Series F, and 9,200,000 Series M shares on March 31 for ~C$420.5 million.
news.summary: Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited has revealed plans to redeem all of its outstanding preferred shares. This includes 5,440,132 Cumulative 5-Year Rate Reset Preferred Shares, Series E, 2,099,046 Cumulative Floating Rate Preferred Shares, Series F, and 9,200,000 Cumulative 5-Year Rate Reset Preferred Shares, Series M. The redemption date is set for March 31, 2025, with a redemption price of C$25.00 per share. The total amount involved in this redemption is estimated to be around C$420.5 million, inclusive of all accrued and unpaid dividends up to the Redemption Date. Note that this redemption amount may be subject to deductions for taxes required by Fairfax.

news.headline: Traws Pharma complies with NASDAQ rule, maintains $2.5 million equity, listed as TRAW on NASDAQ.
news.summary: Traws Pharma, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company based in Newtown, Pennsylvania, disclosed on February 28, 2025, that it has successfully met Nasdaq's minimum stockholders' equity mandate of $2.5 million under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b)(1). The company, listed as TRAW on Nasdaq, primarily focuses on developing oral small molecule medicines to combat respiratory viral illnesses. This development ensures Traws Pharma's continued inclusion and trading on The NASDAQ Capital Market.

ADMA, a Nasdaq-listed company (ticker: ADMA), focuses on manufacturing, marketing, and developing specialty biologics. This participation aims to bolster engagement within the investment community.

This agreement signifies a significant step for Calumet, showcasing their strategic partnerships and ventures.

news.headline: Xali Gold Corp. to acquire Sarape Project in Mexico from AALI, enhancing their portfolio of precious metal assets.
news.summary: Vancouver, BC, 28th February 2025 - Xali Gold Corp. (TSXV:XGC) has recently signed a binding Letter of Intent (LOI) to acquire the Sarape silver-gold Project located in Northern Mexico from Advanced Lithium Corp. This transaction enhances Xali Gold’s Mexican portfolio by adding high-level, low-sulphidation epithermal precious metal assets. The Project is situated in a well-established high-grade silver and gold district, providing significant exploration opportunities. This strategic acquisition highlights the Company's commitment to expanding its presence in lucrative mining regions.

news.headline: CompoSecure completes spin-off of Resolute Holdings into separate public company read more: https://bit.ly/3g7ucTq
news.summary: In Somerset, New Jersey, and New York, on February 28, 2025, CompoSecure, Inc. (Nasdaq: CMPO) disclosed the successful spin-off of its subsidiary, Resolute Holdings Management, Inc. (Nasdaq: RHLD), forming a distinct public entity as of 12:01 a.m. EST on the same day. CompoSecure is a notable player in metal payment cards, security, and authentication solutions.

news.headline: BioXcel Therapeutics (Nasdaq: BTAI) regains Nasdaq compliance with minimum bid price rule.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, BioXcel Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: BTAI), a company focused on utilizing artificial intelligence for developing innovative medicines in neuroscience, revealed that it has been informed by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC that it is now in compliance with the minimum closing bid price standard outlined in Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). This announcement signifies BioXcel Therapeutics' adherence to Nasdaq's stipulations regarding bid price requirements.

news.headline: Abacus Mining & Exploration Corporation is offering $350,000 through a private placement by issuing up to 17,500,000 units at $0.02 per unit.
news.summary: Abacus Mining & Exploration Corporation, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, disclosed on February 28, 2025, the initiation of a non-brokered private placement, aiming to raise a maximum of $350,000. The Company plans to achieve this target by offering up to 17,500,000 units at a value of $0.02 per unit. This Offering presents a significant opportunity for potential investors looking to participate in Abacus's growth and development.

news.headline: Achilles Therapeutics to delist ADSs from Nasdaq and deregister from SEC, calling for liquidation with General Meeting on March 20, 2025.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, Achilles Therapeutics plc (NASDAQ: ACHL) announced its decision to voluntarily delist its American Depositary Shares (ADSs) from Nasdaq and deregister the ADSs from the SEC under Section 12(b) of the Exchange Act. The company will hold a General Meeting on March 20, 2025, to seek shareholder approval for starting a members’ voluntary liquidation. This delisting is part of the process related to the planned liquidation.

news.headline: White Pearl Technology Group AB joins OTCQX, trading under WPTGF, specializing in digital transformation solutions.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that White Pearl Technology Group AB, a global tech firm focusing on digital transformation solutions, has met the requirements to trade on the OTCQX Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc. manages regulated trading markets for 12,000 U.S. and international securities. White Pearl Technology Group AB trades under the tickers WPTG on Nasdaq First North Growth Market Stockholm and WPTGF on OTCQX.

news.headline: Anne De Greef-Safft joins Brady Corp Board of Directors on Feb 25, 2025, per Globe Newswire announcement.

This new appointment marks a significant development for the company as it expands its leadership team. Anne De Greef-Safft's expertise and insights are expected to contribute positively to Brady Corporation's strategic decisions moving forward.

Boralex reports $74 million net earnings for fiscal 2024. Continues large-scale projects in Québec, Ontario, and UK.
news.summary: In Montreal, financial results for Boralex Inc. (TSX: BLX) for the quarter and year ending December 31, 2024, were released on February 28, 2025. The corporation, known as Boralex, reported positive outcomes. The specific numbers were not provided.

news.headline: Akero Therapeutics reports significant reversal of cirrhosis in MASH patients after 96 weeks of treatment. Phase 3 study enrolls patients.
news.summary: A recent study revealed a significant breakthrough in the treatment of compensated cirrhosis, with an unprecedented reversal observed in patients with F4 stage cirrhosis after undergoing a 96-week treatment of efruxifermin (EFX) in the Phase 2b SYMMETRY trial. The report highlighted the statistical significance of these results. Additionally, the Phase 3 SYNCHRONY Real-World Study has successfully completed enrollment for the double-blinded segment. This phase aims to assess the efficacy of EFX in patients diagnosed with either metabolic-associated fatty liver disease (MASLD) or metabolic-associated steatohepatitis (MASH), indicating promising prospects for future treatment options.

news.headline: TeraWulf's Q4 and full year 2024 results show move into AI-driven HPC hosting, aiming for $1B revenue over 10 years.
news.summary: The company has revealed plans to expand its operations into AI-driven HPC hosting. This strategic move involves securing long-term data center leases that are anticipated to yield around $1 billion in total revenue within the first 10 years of the contract term.

news.headline: LVO (Nasdaq: LVO) hits 1M subscribers, with Tesla onboard.
NewGen (NASDAQ: NIVF) regains Nasdaq compliance with minimum bid price rule; transfer to Nasdaq Capital Market announced.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in Bangkok, NewGenIvf Group Limited (NASDAQ: NIVF), a leading fertility services provider in Asia, revealed that it was issued a Compliance Notice from Nasdaq on February 27, 2025. The notice confirmed that the Company has once again met the minimum bid price requirement outlined under the Nasdaq Listing Rule 5450(a)(1). NewGen helps couples and individuals access fertility treatments and is recognized for its comprehensive services in the region.

news.headline: Plug Power Inc. adopts exec compensation program allowing up to 75% in stock, strengthening alignment with shareholders.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in Latham, New York, Plug Power Inc. unveiled a new executive compensation program. Through this program, eligible executives have the option to receive as much as 75% of their pay in Plug stock. This move highlights the company's dedication to syncing leadership incentives with the enhancement of long-term shareholder value.

news.headline: Regeneron's linvoseltamab recommended for EU approval by CHMP to treat R/R MM in patients with at least three prior therapies. EU Commission to finalize decision soon.
news.summary: In Tarrytown, New York, on February 28, 2025, Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN) reported that the European Medicines Agency’s (EMA) Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) has issued a favorable opinion recommending conditional marketing approval of linvoseltamab for the treatment of adults with relapsed and refractory (R/R) multiple myeloma (MM). This recommendation applies to patients who have undergone a minimum of three previous treatments, including a proteasome inhibitor, an immunomodulatory agent, and an anti-CD38 monoclonal antibody, and have shown disease progression on the most recent therapy. The European Commission is anticipated to make a final decision on this matter in the upcoming months.

news.headline: Natural Resource Partners L.P. reports Q4 net income of $42.77K and special distribution of $1.21 per unit.
news.summary: Natural Resource Partners L.P. (NYSE:NRP) announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. In the three months ending December 31, 2024, the company reported a net income of $42,772 and operating cash flow of $66,220. For the entire year of 2024, the net income reached $183,644, and operating cash flow totaled $248,493. Additionally, free cash flow for the fourth quarter was $66,906, and for the full year, it amounted to $251,158. These figures demonstrate the company's financial performance during this period. More detailed financial information can be found in the tables provided in the original release.

news.headline: Invitation Homes (NYSE: INVH) to join Citi's 30th Annual Global Property CEO Conference on March 4, 3:35 p.m. ET. Webcast available.
news.summary: Invitation Homes Inc. revealed that their management team will partake in a roundtable discussion at Citi’s 30th Annual Global Property CEO Conference on March 4th at 3:35 p.m. Eastern Time. The discussion features members of the Company's management and will be accessible through a live audio webcast on the Investor Relations page of the Company's website at www.invh.com. Interested individuals can access a replay of the webcast until April 4th. Invitation Homes is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol INVH.
